---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-inner}
# Shu Lab

::: {.hero-lede}
We build **clinically grounded, data-driven tools** to improve **stroke prevention, neuroendovascular care, and neurorecovery**—connecting large-scale EHR evidence, imaging, and translational insights to decisions that matter at the bedside.

Our work spans national administrative datasets (e.g., NIS/NRD), multicenter registries, and imaging/AI pipelines, with a bias toward **deployable clinical utility** (risk stratification, prognostication, and workflow tools).
:::

:::
:::

::: {.below-hero}
::: {.container-narrow}

::: {.panel}

## [Focus areas](research.qmd)

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.focus-chip}
**Peri-procedural stroke**  
Risk stratification and prevention around procedures and EVT workflows.
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.focus-chip}
**Cerebrovascular epidemiology**  
Nationwide and multicenter evidence (NIS/NRD, registries).
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.focus-chip}
**Imaging + computer vision**  
Neuroimaging phenotypes and practical AI pipelines.
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.focus-chip}
**Neurorecovery analytics**  
Kinematics and neuroanatomy-informed recovery models.
:::
:::
:::
:::

## [Recent publication highlights](publications.qmd)

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.highlight-card}
**Perioperative Stroke**  
*Stroke* (2025) • PubMed: 40444359
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.highlight-card}
**IV thrombolysis in CeAD-related AIS**  
*JAHA* (2025) • PubMed: 39968775
:::
:::

::: {.column width="33%"}
::: {.highlight-card}
**CeAD incidence trends + recurrent stroke risk**  
*Neurology* (2025) • PubMed: 40173376
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
:::
